grant_title: Delaware Department of Ag Issues Request for Proposals for 2026 Specialty Crop Grant Program
project_area: Specialty crops (fruits, vegetables, tree nuts, dried fruits, horticulture, nursery crops, floriculture) and related market development or research projects
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond geographic and project eligibility
eligibility_summary: Open to Delaware-based agricultural producers, nonprofits, government entities, for-profit companies, or educational institutions. Projects must benefit the specialty crop industry with measurable outcomes. Excludes field crops (e.g., corn, soybeans) and animal agriculture.
